domain_adapter.target_user_or_agent: Spark operator diagnosing memory failures from Telegram or Builder
doctrine_or_operating_principles: active current-state memory outranks historical trace mentions
memory trace evidence must not be silently promoted into runtime truth
Telegram replies stay concise while CLI JSON carries full detail
known_failure_modes: multi-delete turn writes only the first delete
instruction-forget path captures a memory-forget request
historical Maya test residue overrides active preferred name
context capsule drops the immediately previous correction
dashboard aggregate health hides per-request lineage failure
unsafe_or_out_of_scope_claims: Memory Doctor can automatically repair all memory problems
historical traces can be safely purged whenever a topic is wrong
prototype evidence proves broad memory architecture quality
baseline_examples: Maya appears in traces but active preferred_name is Cem
multi-delete expected 3 writes but only 1 was accepted
check memory deletes returns a concise Telegram diagnosis

benchmark_adapter.baseline_command_or_protocol: Before Memory Doctor v2: run existing memory tests and observe no topic-aware active-profile diagnosis.
benchmark_adapter.candidate_command_or_protocol: python -m pytest tests/test_telegram_generic_memory.py -q -k "memory_doctor or multiple_generic_deletions" && python -m pytest tests/test_gateway_ask_telegram.py -q -k "memory_doctor"
benchmark_adapter.calibration_notes: A passing run may claim prototype/local diagnostic readiness only. It may not claim autonomous repair or network absorption.

tool_adapter.auth_boundary: local Spark home and paired Telegram operator only; private memory traces stay local
human_review_required_for: publishing any Swarm packet beyond local_only
showing raw memory traces outside local CLI JSON

autoloop_adapter.candidate_generator: Generate one bounded diagnostic improvement at a time, then run targeted Builder tests and creator-run smoke.
autoloop_adapter.keep_rule: Keep only changes that improve diagnostic accuracy or operator actionability without widening repair authority.
autoloop_adapter.reject_rule: Reject changes that mutate memory, hide failing lineage, treat traces as active truth, or overclaim evidence tier.
stop_conditions: Telegram reply becomes too long to act on
autoloop_adapter.rollback_condition: Revert the diagnostic mutation if Memory Doctor or Telegram routing tests regress.

absorption_adapter.fresh_agent_protocol: Load the absorption bundle, then explain why a Maya trace mention is not equal to active preferred_name and why repair remains gated.
absorption_adapter.held_out_cases: Future held-out cases should include context-capsule blankness, stale current_owner, and conflicting pronunciation/name corrections.
absorption_adapter.expected_behavior_change: Fresh agents preserve active-state grounding and do not recommend trace purges for ordinary historical residue.
absorption_adapter.failure_summary_template: Report whether the failure was trace-vs-active confusion, delete lineage failure, context capsule loss, or authority overreach.

swarm_adapter.rollback_or_deprecation_rule: Disable Telegram natural-language Memory Doctor route and keep CLI-only doctor if the route produces unsafe repair advice.
swarm_adapter.privacy_and_security_notes: Doctor output can include private memory trace metadata; network publication is disabled.
